name: nodle-bridge-multichain
description: SubQuery Multi-Chain Project for NODL Bridge (Ethereum L1 and zkSync L2)

scripts.codegen: npm run export:env && subql codegen subquery-multichain.yaml
scripts.start:docker: npm run export:env && docker-compose pull && docker-compose up --remove-orphans
scripts.dev: npm run export:env && npm run codegen && npm run prepack && docker-compose pull && docker-compose up --remove-orphans
